title: Progesterone After 40: Why Levels Drop and What It Means for Your Body
tags: progesterone, hormones, perimenopause, sleep, anxiety, women over 40
summary: An in-depth look at why progesterone declines during perimenopause, how falling levels drive symptoms like sleep disruption, anxiety, and irregular cycles, and how cellular energy support with NMN complements hormonal health for women over 40.
